wikitext:
[]: music             Quote Post by Hand of God » Tue Feb 14, 2006 9:33 pm does anyone have the neon genesis evangelion music sheet for trombone? (feel kinda silly asking like that)

[]:             Quote Post by C.W.Robson46290 » Tue Feb 14, 2006 10:26 pm Well Mr. Hand, I'm sorry taht I can't help you personally. But I will say this. No need at all to be embarassed. I don't see how anyone would be embarassed with wishing to apply NGE to the elegant trombone. Hell if there is piano music there must be trombone music somewhere. So sit proud and wait for someone who is WAY more helpful than I am. Sorry again!
